category_title: ADHD-diagnosed student who uses withdrawal and peer support to manage classroom noise and tasks
minimal_context: Adam is participating in a classroom lesson with his peers.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Everyone, please start talking with your groups to complete today's classroom lesson.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Covers his ears as the classroom noise level becomes too high)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Adam, please focus on the lesson.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Starts to become angry because he cannot cope with the situation by himself)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to stay in your seat and work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits underneath a table and keeps his ears covered)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Everyone, please start talking with your groups to complete today's classroom lesson.

STUDENT: (Covers his ears as the classroom noise level becomes too high)

TUTOR: Adam, please focus on the lesson.

STUDENT: (Starts to become angry because he cannot cope with the situation by himself)

TUTOR: You need to stay in your seat and work.

STUDENT: (Sits underneath a table and keeps his ears covered)

context.environment: Classroom lesson where noise levels became unmanageable

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the noise level was too high
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Adam covered his ears and sat underneath a table.
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: could not cope with the situation by himself

behavior_patterns.condition: in his previous reactions to these situations
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: he would become angry, lose the ability to control his anger or hit others.
behavior_patterns.internal_state: could not cope with the situation by himself
